---
title: "1st Peritoneal Summit · Pontresina 2025"
toc: false
---

The inaugural Peritoneal Summit took place from **15 – 17 January 2025** at the Kongresszentrum in **Pontresina**, Switzerland, jointly organized by the **University of Bern** and **ETH Zürich**.

<!-- TODO: replace with content from the funding-agency report:
     - paragraph on the summit's framing and goals
     - participant numbers, demographic mix, institutions
     - session highlights / standout talks
     - workshop topics
     - what the funders need to know about the impact
-->

## Highlights

<!-- TODO: 2-3 short bullets summarizing the meeting. -->

## Award winners

<!-- TODO: list of award winners with photos in assets/past/2025/ -->

## Group photo

<!-- TODO: ![](../assets/past/2025/group-photo.jpg) -->

## Acknowledgements

<!-- TODO: funding agencies, sponsoring societies, host institutions -->
